_FINDINGS.DELETION_PROTECTION_OFF: Production DB has DeletionProtection=false — a typo in the console can wipe the cluster.
_FINDINGS.MULTI_AZ_OFF: Single-AZ. Outage in us-east-1a/c/d = downtime. Aurora replicas should fix this for SLA.
_FINDINGS.NO_IAM_AUTH: Password-only auth. With the SG wide open, this is the only thing standing between the internet and the DB.
_FINDINGS.NO_PERFORMANCE_INSIGHTS: Hard to debug slow queries / detect anomalous activity.
